mapper.sql: id, plan_no, plan_name, customer, release_date_begin, release_date_end, release_status, sales_type, media_requirements, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM plan ORDER BY updated_at DESC
SELECT FROM plan WHERE customer = #{customer} ORDER BY updated_at DESC
SELECT FROM plan WHERE release_status = #{releaseStatus} ORDER BY updated_at DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO plan ( plan_no, plan_name, customer, release_date_begin, release_date_end, release_status, sales_type, media_requirements ) VALUES
(#{item.planNo}, #{item.planName}, #{item.customer}, #{item.releaseDateBegin}, #{item.releaseDateEnd}, #{item.releaseStatus}, #{item.salesType}, #{item.mediaRequirements})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM plan WHERE id IN
#{id}
